array.string:
while true; do # Check Bridge 1 CURRENT_IP1=$(ipconfig getifaddr $(networksetup -listallhardwareports | awk '/EXO Thunderbolt 1/{getline; print $2}')) if [[ "$CURRENT_IP1" != "10.0.x.x" ]]; then /usr/sbin/networksetup -setmanual "EXO Thunderbolt 1" 10.0.x.x 255.255.255.0 "" fi
# Check Bridge 2 CURRENT_IP2=$(ipconfig getifaddr $(networksetup -listallhardwareports | awk '/EXO Thunderbolt 2/{getline; print $2}')) if [[ "$CURRENT_IP2" != "10.0.x.x" ]]; then /usr/sbin/networksetup -setmanual "EXO Thunderbolt 2" 10.0.x.x 255.255.255.0 "" fi
sleep 30 done
